caption: In a spacious indoor hall featuring a raised blue platform and ornate chandeliers, several men practice martial arts. Most participants are dressed in traditional white uniforms, while one man wears a blue outfit and another is in black. The sequence begins with the men in dynamic poses; the man in blue is mid-leap, and others are shifted into various stances. As the action progresses, the man in blue lands and transitions into a deep, wide lunging strike with his arm extended. Simultaneously, the men in white and black move in coordination, shifting their weight and executing corresponding strikes and defensive postures. The background shows a large audience seated at tables, watching the demonstration. The lighting is bright and warm, and the movements across the frames show a synchronized transition from high-energy leaps to grounded, disciplined martial arts forms.
